creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, May 20, 2011 at 03:11:08AM +0200, Dragan Jovicic wrote:
> On Fri, 20 May 2011 02:32:06 +0200, YongHyeon PYUN <pyunyh@gmail.com>  
> wrote:
> 
> >On Fri, May 20, 2011 at 02:16:33AM +0200, Dragan Jovicic wrote:
> >>Recompiled. Unfortunately it freezes again as soon as there's traffic.
> >>
> >
> >Ah, I'm so sorry. There was a bug in the patch. Please try attached
> >patch again.
> >
> 
> Please no need to be.
> In fact I think it works fine now!
> I will do more testing to be completely sure, but it does look really good.
> 

I doubt your controller will support 64bit DMA for TX/RX buffers so
it would be better to experiment the second patch.

> Thank You
>
